headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 We Brush Off
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.

headline: These 3 Stocks Have Crushed the Market, and the Next 10 Years Could Be Even Better
summary: Visa, Costco, and Intuitive Surgical are all positioned to keep winning.
